descriptions.npc_introduction:
He is a tall, broad-shouldered man with dark hair and charcoal robes. His presence makes you a little uncomfortable, but you can't put a finger on why.
He stands near the podium at the head of the aisle of the church, seemingly deep in thought.

conversation_parts.start: Well, good to see you finally arrived, [[playername]]. Everyone else has long gone, but I could still use your help, if you're willing.
conversation_parts.end: Alright. Enough for now then, I suppose.

unsure: I'm not really sure what you're talking about, to be honest.
I'm not sure I know what you mean.
nothing_else: I have nothing futher on that topic.
I have nothing else to say on that.
I think that's all there is of interest to you on this.

descriptions.generic: a bridge troll, green of skin and weathered, wearing a satchel over its shoulder and a loincloth protecting its dignity
descriptions.npc_introduction: Stooped over and seemingly staring at a dandelion growing from the ground, you see a bridge troll. A patched leather satchel hangs loose over one shoulder, its weathered bare skin showing everywhere except for where it was covered by a thin, worn loincloth.

conversation_parts.trade_end: Bah, no more soft-moss? Beh-crz ih.
